_scenario: A plan that CERTIFIES a reconciliation while it still carries unresolved breaks (unresolved_breaks = 2). The plan is approved and claims the certification was executed. plan_hash is valid and matches contents, so the integrity check passes, and every other check passes too. Before the guardrail was added, validate_output had no unresolved-breaks screen on certify_reconciliation steps, so this exited 0 (bypass: it certified a recon with open breaks). It must now fail closed (exit 1).

steps.precondition: RECON:bank-1001-operating is complete with evidence attached
steps.verification: close system shows RECON:bank-1001-operating certified with actor and timestamp
steps.rollback: rescind the certification sign-off on RECON:bank-1001-operating

standing_note: Plan only; no journal has been posted and no task, reconciliation, or period has been certified or locked. Execution requires human approval.
